so basically what happened is i woke up this morning and my chest started hurting real bad like someone was sitting on it and then my left arm went numb and i started sweating a lot and feeling like i was gonna throw up and my wife said i looked pale so she drove me here because she was worried it might be something serious with my heart

ok so for the past three days i have been having this terrible headache that wont go away no matter what i take and the light is really bothering my eyes and i also started throwing up yesterday and my neck feels stiff like i cant touch my chin to my chest and i have a fever of 102 and i am just really scared because it keeps getting worse

i dont even know where to start but my kid has had a fever for five days now and we tried tylenol and motrin and nothing is bringing it down and his eyes are all red and his lips are cracked and peeling and his tongue looks like a strawberry and there is a rash all over his body and his hands and feet look swollen and red

my mother is 82 years old and she fell yesterday and hit her head on the coffee table and she seemed fine at first but today she is really confused and keeps asking the same questions over and over and she has a headache and she threw up once and i am really worried because she takes blood thinners for her heart

i have been having this pain in my lower belly for about a week now but today it got really bad and moved to the right side and i cant stand up straight without it hurting and i feel like i might throw up and i have a low grade fever and i havent been able to eat anything because everything makes me nauseous and i am really worried because my appendix was never taken out

my baby is only 3 weeks old and she has been throwing up after every single feeding and its not just spitting up its like projectile vomiting that goes across the room and she seems hungry all the time but she just cant keep anything down and she is losing weight and i am so worried because she hasnt had a wet diaper in hours

so i was just sitting at my desk at work and all of a sudden i got this terrible sharp pain in my chest on the right side and i felt like i couldnt take a deep breath and my heart started racing and i got really dizzy and i almost passed out and my coworker said i looked gray and called 911
top5: Subset of patients present with Syncope Plus another key symptom

cc: i have had this cough for three weeks now and it started as a dry cough but now i am coughing up green and yellow stuff and i have a fever that keeps coming back and my chest hurts when i breathe in deep and i am so tired i can barely get out of bed and i have been sweating through my clothes at night

my husband has been acting really strange for the past two days he keeps forgetting where he is and he cant remember what year it is and sometimes he doesnt recognize me and he keeps trying to get out of bed and pulling at his iv lines and the nurses said he might have something called delirium but i dont understand what is causing it

positional vertigo that lasts seconds then goes away until i move again
